title: swertia helenia
intro: Swertia helenia, also known as Himalayan Sweetroot, is a plant species belonging to the gentian family that is native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Swertia helenia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
